summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Mirai Design landing page upgrade. All requested features verified working correctly: real high-quality Unsplash images across all sections, no blur/fog/haze effects, correct CTA links (Calendly and WhatsApp), 3 subscription plans without buyout prices, currency switcher working, and mobile responsive layout.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Frontend is Vite + React 18 with i18n support. All images use Unsplash URLs and load successfully.

hero_rotating_images.details: Hero section has rotating real images from Unsplash with 'Demo preview' label and niche tags (Beauty Studio, Physio Clinic, Barber Shop)

no_blur_effects.details: No blur/fog/haze effects found anywhere on the site. Header uses solid background (rgba(10, 10, 11, 0.95)) instead of backdrop-filter blur

what_we_build_section.details: 3 cards with real Unsplash images (One-page site, Business website, Landing pages)

before_after_section.details: Real contrasting images with Before/After labels and descriptive text

process_section.details: 4 process steps with real images per step (Quick call, Demo, Materials, Launch)

featured_demos_section.details: 3 demo cards with real images, 'Demo preview' labels, and city/niche tags

work_portfolio_page.details: 6 portfolio cards with real Unsplash thumbnail images, filter buttons working

about_page_images.details: Hero image and 2 supporting images (workspace, collaboration) all loading from Unsplash

contact_page_image.details: Supporting image near form loading correctly

packages_3_plans.details: 3 plans displayed: Start, Standard, Pro - no buyout prices visible

calendly_cta_links.details: All 'Book a call' CTAs link to correct Calendly URL: https://calendly.com/mateusz-wieckowski-okm6/30-minute-meeting-with-mirai-design

currency_switcher.details: All 4 currencies working: PLN, EUR, CNY, JPY - prices update correctly

all_images_load.details: All 23 images across all pages load successfully (no 404 errors)

mobile_responsive.details: Layout adapts correctly to mobile viewport (390x844), cards stack vertically, hamburger menu visible
